title: Expert Analysis: Bitfarms Stronghold Acquisition as Defensive Strategy
text: Experts view Bitfarms $175 million acquisition of Stronghold Digital Mining as calculated defense against Riot's hostile takeover bid. Julio Verissimo, CEO of Borderless Consulting, states by acquiring Stronghold, Bitfarms demonstrates proactive steps to increase value and strengthen negotiating position. Deal adds 307 megawatts of power capacity, positioning Bitfarms to reach 950+ MW by end of 2025, making company more formidable and expensive acquisition target. By expanding company size and value, Bitfarms proportionally reduces Riot's 19% ownership stake, weakening its leverage in potential acquisition scenario. Verissimo notes acquisition could slow down or stall Riot's attempt by introducing regulatory scrutiny that lengthens takeover process. Nicole DeCicco, CryptoConsultz CEO, characterizes this as way to enhance shareholder value and make Bitfarms more formidable entity, providing negotiating leverage in strategic negotiations.
